hero.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
hero.author: Christian D. Larson

aries.general: Today is a day filled with energy and opportunity for Aries. Embrace new challenges.
aries.love: Expect some surprises in your love life today, be open to possibilities.
aries.career: A great day for networking and making connections that could lead to new opportunities.

taurus.general: A calm day allows you to reflect on your goals and align your actions with them.
taurus.love: Emotional conversations might bring about a deeper understanding between you and your partner.
taurus.career: Your persistence at work will pay off; keep pushing through the challenges.

gemini.general: Your adaptable nature will be an asset today as new situations arise.
gemini.love: Flirtation is in the air, enjoy the fun and light-hearted moments.
gemini.career: Communicating your ideas clearly will attract support from colleagues.

cancer.general: Focus on home and family matters; nurturing your loved ones brings peace.
cancer.love: Romantic gestures will strengthen bonds with your partner today.
cancer.career: A focus on teamwork could bring about successful outcomes.

leo.general: Your charisma shines bright today, drawing people toward you.
leo.love: Expect thrilling moments in your love life; surprise your partner with something special.
leo.career: Seize the moment to showcase your talents at work.

virgo.general: Today is perfect for practical considerations and improving your routines.
virgo.love: It's a great time for healing and resolving past issues with loved ones.
virgo.career: Attention to detail will lead to impressive results at work.

libra.general: Social interactions are favored today; get out and meet new people.
libra.love: A chance encounter could spark a new romance.
libra.career: Balance and diplomacy will be key in resolving workplace conflicts.

scorpio.general: Emotional depth is heightened; explore your feelings and express them authentically.
scorpio.love: Intensify the passion in your relationship by being open about your desires.
scorpio.career: Your investigative nature can lead to uncovering valuable insights at work.

sagittarius.general: Adventure awaits; seek new experiences and broaden your horizons.
sagittarius.love: A playful spirit will attract positive attention from potential partners.
sagittarius.career: Embrace the changes coming your way; they are for your growth.

capricorn.general: Stability and routine are comforting; focus on solidifying your plans.
capricorn.love: A heartfelt conversation can clear up misunderstandings with your partner.
capricorn.career: Your disciplined approach will yield great progress in your projects.

aquarius.general: Innovation and creativity spark today; use them to solve problems.
aquarius.love: Freedom is key in love; embrace the uniqueness of your relationship.
aquarius.career: Thinking outside the box can lead to a breakthrough at work.

pisces.general: Intuition guides your actions today; trust your instincts.
pisces.love: A romantic atmosphere surrounds you; make plans that enhance your connection.
pisces.career: Creative collaboration will lead to fruitful outcomes.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Talk is cheap. Actions are priceless.
professional.author: Anonymous

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
professional.author: C.S. Lewis

professional.text: Do not wait to strike till the iron is hot, but make it hot by striking.
professional.author: William Butler Yeats

motivation.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
motivation.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
motivation.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Anonymous

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Anonymous

motivation.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Every day may not be good, but there's something good in every day.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Life is a journey, not a destination.
captions.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

captions.text: Take only pictures, leave only footprints.
captions.author: Anonymous

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The great myth of our times is that technology is communication.
tech.author: Libby Larsen

tech.text: The future is already here — it’s just not very evenly distributed.
tech.author: William Gibson

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: Tech is not just a tool. It can give you a voice and a platform.
tech.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me Kit-Kats!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I would avoid the sushi if I was you. It’s a little fishy.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I’m reading a book on anti-gravity. It’s impossible to put down!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Why was the math book sad? Because it had too many problems.
fun.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the assurance of things hoped for, the conviction of things not seen.
faith.author: Hebrews 11:1

faith.text: Everything that is done in the world is done by hope.
faith.author: Martin Luther

faith.text: Keep your faith stronger than your fears.
faith.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith sees the invisible, believes the unbelievable, and receives the impossible.
faith.author: Anonymous

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, we are always students.
wisdom.author: Anonymous

wisdom.text: Patience is the companion of wisdom.
wisdom.author: Augustine of Hippo

wisdom.text: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for himself.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu
